title: DefenceZ
description: A defense plugin for gens servers
body:
**DefenceZ**

DefenceZ brings strategy and teamwork to your Minecraft server with upgradable defensive structures, explosive bombs, and gang-based collaboration!

**🔹 Defense Blocks**

Build and upgrade powerful defense structures through 10 progressive tiers — from basic Cobblestone walls to near-indestructible Obsidian fortresses!
Each upgrade boosts health and changes materials, with intuitive balancing for competitive gameplay.

**🔹 Bombs**

Deploy small, medium, and large bombs to break through enemy defenses! Each bomb deals strategic damage, creating thrilling siege scenarios.

**🔹 Gangs**

Team up with friends! Create gangs, invite members, manage your group, and coordinate in a private gang chat channel. Perfect for faction-like battles or organized server wars.
Features

    10 defense levels with increasing strength and material variety.

    Three bomb types with escalating destructive power.

    Gang system: create, manage, and chat privately with your group.

    Intuitive commands for admins and players.

    Vault integration for economy-based upgrades.

Commands

    /givedefense <level> — Give a defense block.

    /givebomb <small|medium|large> — Give a bomb.

    /gang <create|invite|accept|leave|kick|list|info|disband> — Manage gangs.

    /gangchat <message> (or /gc) — Chat with your gang.

Permissions

    defencez.givedefense

    defencez.givebomb

    defencez.gang

    defencez.gangchat

✅ Supports Minecraft 1.20+

✅ Lightweight & easy to use

✅ Built for competitive and cooperative server gameplay
